faqs.q: What factors affect Aston Martin rental prices in Dubai?
faqs.a: Aston Martin rental prices in Dubai depend on the specific model, its age and specifications, the rental duration, mileage allowance, and market demand. Highly specified or modified models command higher rates than entry-level models. Peak seasons — Dubai Shopping Festival, New Year, and major events — also affect availability and pricing.

faqs.q: What Aston Martin models are available to rent in Dubai?
faqs.a: Luxury Supercar Rentals offers the following Aston Martin models: Aston Martin Vantage and Aston Martin DBX 707. Availability changes — contact +971 56 526 6295 for current stock.

faqs.q: How much does it cost to rent a Aston Martin in Dubai?
faqs.a: Aston Martin rental prices in Dubai start from AED 1,800 per day for entry-level models and go up to AED 2,500 per day for highly specified or modified models. Weekly and monthly packages offer reduced per-day rates. The price table on this page lists current rates for every Aston Martin in the fleet.

faqs.q: What documents do I need to rent a Aston Martin in Dubai?
faqs.a: UAE residents need a valid Emirates ID or passport and a UAE driving license. Tourists need a valid passport, visit visa, their home-country driving license, and an International Driving Permit (IDP) if required by their country of origin. All renters must be at least 21 years old.

faqs.q: Can I rent a Aston Martin in Dubai with a US driver’s license?
faqs.a: Yes. A valid US driver’s license is accepted for renting a Aston Martin in Dubai. An International Driving Permit (IDP) is generally not required for US license holders. You must be at least 21 years old and present a valid passport. UAE residents need a UAE driving license.

faqs.q: Can tourists rent a Aston Martin in Dubai?
faqs.a: Yes, tourists can rent a Aston Martin in Dubai. You need a valid passport, visit visa, your domestic driving license, and an International Driving Permit (IDP) if required by your country. The minimum age is 21 years. Free delivery is available to Dubai hotels and airports.

faqs.q: What is the minimum age to rent a Aston Martin in Dubai?
faqs.a: The minimum age to rent a Aston Martin from Luxury Supercar Rentals is 21 years old. This applies to both residents and tourists.

faqs.q: Is insurance included with a Aston Martin rental in Dubai?
faqs.a: Yes, basic insurance is included with every Aston Martin rental. Full-coverage insurance can be arranged at an additional cost. Please confirm your insurance requirements at the time of booking.

faqs.q: Is a security deposit required to rent a Aston Martin in Dubai?
faqs.a: No security deposit is required for selected Aston Martin models. A refundable AED 5,000 security deposit may apply to certain high-value or limited models. The deposit is refunded via bank transfer within 28 days of return, provided there are no damages, fines, or outstanding charges.

faqs.q: What is and isn’t included in a Aston Martin rental price?
faqs.a: Included: basic insurance, 250 km/day mileage, free delivery across Dubai, 24/7 support. Not included: VAT (5%), additional mileage (AED 20/km), Salik tolls, traffic fines, late return fees, and a cleaning fee of AED 1,500 if smoking inside the vehicle is detected. Parking fees during the rental period are also the renter’s responsibility.

faqs.q: How many kilometres are included per day with a Aston Martin rental?
faqs.a: Each Aston Martin rental includes 250 km per day. Additional kilometres beyond the daily limit are charged at AED 20 per km.

faqs.q: What is the fuel policy for Aston Martin rentals in Dubai?
faqs.a: The vehicle must be returned with the same fuel level as at pickup. If the fuel level is lower, the cost of refuelling plus a service fee will be deducted from the security deposit.

faqs.q: Can I drive a rental Aston Martin to Abu Dhabi?
faqs.a: Yes, driving to Abu Dhabi is permitted. Salik toll charges and any traffic fines incurred during the rental period will be deducted from the security deposit. Confirm any geographic restrictions at the time of booking.

faqs.q: Is delivery available at Dubai Airport or my hotel?
faqs.a: Yes, free delivery and collection are available across Dubai, including Dubai International Airport (DXB), Al Maktoum International Airport (DWC), and all Dubai hotels. Delivery is coordinated with your flight or check-in schedule.

faqs.q: Which Aston Martin model is best for my trip?
faqs.a: The best model depends on your preferences and requirements. Contact our team at +971 56 526 6295 to discuss your needs — we can recommend the most suitable Aston Martin based on your trip duration, passenger count, and driving preferences.

faqs.q: Does it make financial sense to rent rather than own a Aston Martin in Dubai?
faqs.a: Renting a Aston Martin in Dubai avoids the long-term costs of ownership: depreciation, insurance, registration, maintenance, and storage. It is a practical option for visitors, residents who drive occasionally, or anyone wanting to experience a specific model for an event, photoshoot, or weekend trip without committing to a purchase.

We proudly offer the best option to rent a Range Rover with no deposit; however, T&Cs apply. Please note that some of our models may require you to pay some money in advance. That deposit will be returned to you at the end of your rental period. So, it is ideal to call our sales team to know whether this specific model comes under the no deposit category or not.

At Luxury Supercar Rentals, we make sure to make the whole luxury car renting in Dubai as convenient as possible. We do not differentiate our clients based on their rental period. We treat each client with extreme care and attention. Also, you don’t need to pay a very large amount upfront, even if you are renting on a daily or monthly basis. We believe in retaining our clients on a long-term basis; that’s why we make every effort so that they feel happy from the moment they contact us until the return of the car.

sections.h2: Rental Conditions to Rent a Range Rover in Dubai

body.text: At Luxury Supercar Rentals, we go the extra mile to offer our clients the very best. We have built trust among our clients over the years by offering a clear and honest process. If you’re considering renting a Range Rover in Dubai, don’t forget to read the Range Rover rental conditions below. This will clear up all the questions in your mind. But if you are still confused, just give us a call, and we will guide you exactly according to your requirements.

items: You must be above 21 years old.

We have no deposit policy. However, for some models, you may be required to pay a security fee of AED 5,000 via credit/debit card or cash. This fee is refundable and will be transferred back via bank wire after 28 days. Keep in mind, this is only refundable if there are no damages or fines. Otherwise, this cost will be deducted from the security deposit.
A 250 km/day mileage limit is allowed. An extra cost of AED 21/km is charged for additional mileage.
Payments via Visa/MasterCard will be charged a fee of 3%, while this fee is 5% for American Express.
You must not smoke inside the car. And if you violate this rule, you will be charged AED 1,500 for cleaning or deodorizing.
No cleaning charges are applied if the vehicle is returned in proper condition.
SALIK tolls and fines will be deducted from the security fee.
All prices are exclusive of 5% VAT.

When you return the Range Rover to us, make sure that the fuel level is the same as it was at the time of delivery. If the fuel level is lower than that, refueling cost and service fees will be deducted from the security deposit.
The rental period is 24 hours. If the vehicle is returned after that 24-hour period, it will cost you extra based on how many additional hours or days the vehicle is kept.

If you plan to extend your rental period, it is crucial that you inform us before your return time. Extensions will depend on the availability of the vehicle and will cost you extra based on the duration.
The vehicle must not be used for off-roading, drifting, reckless driving, stunts, or on race tracks. If you violate these rules, you’ll be fined and held responsible for any damage caused.

faqs.q: What factors affect Rolls Royce rental prices in Dubai?
faqs.a: Rolls Royce rental prices in Dubai depend on the specific model, its age and specifications, the rental duration, mileage allowance, and market demand. Highly specified or modified models command higher rates than entry-level models. Peak seasons — Dubai Shopping Festival, New Year, and major events — also affect availability and pricing.

faqs.a: Luxury Supercar Rentals offers the following Rolls Royce models: Rolls Royce Wraith Black Badge, Rolls Royce Dawn Black, Rolls Royce Dawn White, Rolls Royce Cullinan, Rolls Royce Cullinan Mansory Black and Rolls Royce Cullinan Mansory. Availability changes — contact +971 56 526 6295 for current stock.

faqs.q: How much does it cost to rent a Rolls Royce in Dubai?
faqs.a: Rolls Royce rental prices in Dubai start from AED 2,000 per day for entry-level models and go up to AED 5,500 per day for highly specified or modified models. Weekly and monthly packages offer reduced per-day rates. The price table on this page lists current rates for every Rolls Royce in the fleet.

faqs.q: What documents do I need to rent a Rolls Royce in Dubai?
faqs.a: UAE residents need a valid Emirates ID or passport and a UAE driving license. Tourists need a valid passport, visit visa, their home-country driving license, and an International Driving Permit (IDP) if required by their country of origin. All renters must be at least 21 years old.

faqs.q: Can I rent a Rolls Royce in Dubai with a US driver’s license?
faqs.a: Yes. A valid US driver’s license is accepted for renting a Rolls Royce in Dubai. An International Driving Permit (IDP) is generally not required for US license holders. You must be at least 21 years old and present a valid passport. UAE residents need a UAE driving license.

faqs.q: Can tourists rent a Rolls Royce in Dubai?
faqs.a: Yes, tourists can rent a Rolls Royce in Dubai. You need a valid passport, visit visa, your domestic driving license, and an International Driving Permit (IDP) if required by your country. The minimum age is 21 years. Free delivery is available to Dubai hotels and airports.

faqs.q: What is the minimum age to rent a Rolls Royce in Dubai?
faqs.a: The minimum age to rent a Rolls Royce from Luxury Supercar Rentals is 21 years old. This applies to both residents and tourists.

faqs.q: Is insurance included with a Rolls Royce rental in Dubai?
faqs.a: Yes, basic insurance is included with every Rolls Royce rental. Full-coverage insurance can be arranged at an additional cost. Please confirm your insurance requirements at the time of booking.

faqs.q: Is a security deposit required to rent a Rolls Royce in Dubai?
faqs.a: No security deposit is required for selected Rolls Royce models. A refundable AED 5,000 security deposit may apply to certain high-value or limited models. The deposit is refunded via bank transfer within 28 days of return, provided there are no damages, fines, or outstanding charges.

faqs.q: What is and isn’t included in a Rolls Royce rental price?
faqs.a: Included: basic insurance, 250 km/day mileage, free delivery across Dubai, 24/7 support. Not included: VAT (5%), additional mileage (AED 20/km), Salik tolls, traffic fines, late return fees, and a cleaning fee of AED 1,500 if smoking inside the vehicle is detected. Parking fees during the rental period are also the renter’s responsibility.

faqs.q: How many kilometres are included per day with a Rolls Royce rental?
faqs.a: Each Rolls Royce rental includes 250 km per day. Additional kilometres beyond the daily limit are charged at AED 20 per km.

faqs.q: What is the fuel policy for Rolls Royce rentals in Dubai?
faqs.a: The vehicle must be returned with the same fuel level as at pickup. If the fuel level is lower, the cost of refuelling plus a service fee will be deducted from the security deposit.

faqs.q: Can I drive a rental Rolls Royce to Abu Dhabi?
faqs.a: Yes, driving to Abu Dhabi is permitted. Salik toll charges and any traffic fines incurred during the rental period will be deducted from the security deposit. Confirm any geographic restrictions at the time of booking.

faqs.q: Is delivery available at Dubai Airport or my hotel?
faqs.a: Yes, free delivery and collection are available across Dubai, including Dubai International Airport (DXB), Al Maktoum International Airport (DWC), and all Dubai hotels. Delivery is coordinated with your flight or check-in schedule.

faqs.q: Which Rolls Royce model is best for my trip?
faqs.a: The best model depends on your preferences and requirements. Contact our team at +971 56 526 6295 to discuss your needs — we can recommend the most suitable Rolls Royce based on your trip duration, passenger count, and driving preferences.

faqs.q: Does it make financial sense to rent rather than own a Rolls Royce in Dubai?
faqs.a: Renting a Rolls Royce in Dubai avoids the long-term costs of ownership: depreciation, insurance, registration, maintenance, and storage. It is a practical option for visitors, residents who drive occasionally, or anyone wanting to experience a specific model for an event, photoshoot, or weekend trip without committing to a purchase.
